caption: A group of eight young people stands in a close-knit pose in front of a brick building with a red door. The individuals are dressed in casual attire, including a mix of white, black, and yellow t-shirts, paired with light-colored pants or dark trousers. The group consists of several girls and boys, some of whom are leaning in towards each other, smiling for the camera. One individual in the center wears a bright yellow shirt, while others wear neutral tones. They are positioned on a concrete pavement. Throughout the sequence, the group remains stationary in their pose, maintaining their expressions and positions without any significant movement or change in the scene. There is no visible text, logos, or equipment present in the environment.
